examples: The street was lined on both sides by blank, doorless, windowless walls.
He still works every day, moving in his doorless workshop from sculpting to drawing to writing on his Olivetti typewriter.
An elevator constructed of a series of doorless compartments hung on chains that move slowly and continuously allowing passengers to step on and off at will.
One was a cross between a Tesla Roadster and a doorless dune buggy.
In New Zealand, an industrial design student has come up with a concept for a doorless refrigerator that reduces food spoilage.
